remarks: Welcome to this beautifully updated four bedroom home on .58 acres in the desirable Silvermine area on the Norwalk/Wilton line. Lovely front porch entry to large and gracious tiled foyer that leads to spacious family room with fireplace & porcelain tile floor, bedroom or office w/parquet floor & industrial gym mat, full bath and laundry room plus garage access. Stunning upper level with open floor plan includes remodeled kitchen with large island seating & tiled floor, spacious living room and dining room with attractive lighting & ceiling fan, wood floors and sliders to large & private deck. Serene backyard with hot tub and wood pile shed. Primary bedroom with ensuite bath, two additional bedrooms and updated hall bath. Updated doors, moldings & hardware throughout most of the house. Lower level offers an opportunity for an accessory apartment. Great location with easy access to Rt. 7, I95 connector and Merritt parkway as well as the convenience of a variety of shopping and restaurants. 1st Fl heat pump 3 years; 2nd Fl heat pump less than a year. Move-in ready! Additional photos coming soon.
